creator: lidl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Compared to a machine where the zpool has been upgraded:

root@hydra-353: zpool status
  pool: sys
 state: ONLINE
  scan: scrub repaired 0 in 1h32m with 0 errors on Fri Oct 14 05:11:35 2016
config:

	NAME          STATE     READ WRITE CKSUM
	sys           ONLINE       0     0     0
	  mirror-0    ONLINE       0     0     0
	    gpt/sys0  ONLINE       0     0     0
	    gpt/sys1  ONLINE       0     0     0

errors: No known data errors
